column1: Nonprofit educating college women for careers in asset management. Vision: 30% of investable assets managed by women by 2030. Programs: Summer Intensive, Online Intensive, Alumni Career Institute -- all tuition-free. 4,000+ alumni. 130 partner firms. 75%+ alumni stay in industry. No fees.
column2: Katherine Jollon Colsher, President & CEO (linkedin.com/in/katherine-jollon-colsher) New York, NY; Seema Hingorani, Founder & Board Chair (linkedin.com/in/seema-hingorani-6156b85) New York, NY

column1: Values-aligned investing education for women. Programs: expert-led courses, peer-led Circles (8-20 women, 6-month program), monthly events. Focus: climate justice, gender equity, local economies. 2,500+ women in community. Free to start. 80% of participants begin impact investing.
column2: Janine Firpo, Co-Founder (linkedin.com/in/janine-firpo-047282) Oakland, CA; Ellen Remmer, Co-Founder (linkedin.com/in/ellen-remmer-8503762) Boston, MA

column1: Angel investing network + bootcamp closing gender gap. Bootcamp: NYC + online, ~4x/year. 80+ women angel investors. Membership: $4,500 first year (includes training), $3,000/year after. Must be accredited. Min check: $25K. Deals $50K-$200K. Stage: seed. Sectors: health & wellness, future of work, life sciences (23%), consumer (21%). Reviews ~2,500 cos/year, invests in ~10.
column2: Angela Lee, Founder & CEO (linkedin.com/in/hiangela) New York, NY

column1: Angel investing bootcamp for women (cis, trans, non-binary). 3-day virtual bootcamp covers bias training, valuations, due diligence, term sheets. 300+ members invested $5M+ in 50+ companies. Min investment: $5,000 per pitch summit. Must be accredited. Sold to IFEL in 2023.
column2: Jill Johnson, CEO (linkedin.com/in/smallbizexpert) Newark, NJ; Natalia Oberti Noguera, Founder (linkedin.com/in/nataliaobertinoguera) New York, NY

column1: Nonprofit educating angel investors and entrepreneurs. 400+ courses across 38 states and 40 countries. Publishes Halo Report (with PitchBook) on angel investment trends. Not a fund -- training and research org. No public membership fees.
column2: Gwen Edwards, Chair & Lead Instructor (linkedin.com/in/gwencedwards) San Francisco, CA; Susan Preston, Trustee & Lead Instructor (linkedin.com/in/susanpreston) Seattle, WA

column1: Founded 2015 to get 1,000 women to make first angel investment. Angel Academy: 8-week self-paced training. Acquired by Highline Beta in 2017. Members co-invest alongside Highline Beta. NOTE: femalefunders.com now redirects to highlinebeta.com.
column2: Katherine Hague, Founder -- Toronto, ON (Canada)

column1: US Dept of Commerce trade program. Mentorship and investment matchmaking for women-led tech companies. Government-run initiative.
column2: US Dept of Commerce

column1: Nonprofit creating pathways for women in tech leadership. Angel Program: 2-day intensive with Alba Graduate Business School (Greece). Covers valuations, due diligence, term sheets. Cost: 800 euros. 3-month mentoring + women investor network. 7,000+ online community. NOTE: Greece-based.
column2: Eleni Aktypi, Managing Director (linkedin.com/in/elenidaktypi) Athens, Greece

column1: One of largest US angel networks for women-led startups. Founded 2004. 1,150+ investors, 9 chapters, 28 states. Invested $195M in 274+ women-led companies, generating $2.5B+ in follow-on. Stage: early-stage (pre-money <$5M). Seeks $250K-$2M raises. Accredited investors. Initiation fee + annual dues (contact for pricing).
column2: Loretta McCarthy, Co-CEO & Managing Partner (linkedin.com/in/loretta-mccarthy-b885a) New York, NY; Jo Ann Corkran, Co-CEO & Managing Partner (linkedin.com/in/jo-ann-corkran-06600531) New York, NY

column1: Largest US VC with gender lens. $500M+ AUM. Fund III: $250M. Checks: $2M-$10M. Stage: Late Seed through Series C. Targets $500K-$15M ARR. Sectors: healthcare, education, sustainability, economic opportunity. Requires female CEO or women in C-level roles with equity.
column2: Jenny Abramson, Founder & Managing Partner (linkedin.com/in/jenny-abramson-bb75297) Washington, DC; Heidi Krauel Patel, Managing Partner (linkedin.com/in/heidi-krauel-patel-a4b5) San Francisco, CA

column1: Seed-stage VC investing exclusively in female-founded companies. ~$140M across 5 funds. Fund IV: $29M (Dec 2025). Sectors: digital healthcare, AI, beauty, deep tech, e-commerce, fintech. 100+ portfolio cos. Notable: Billie ($310M acq), Rent the Runway (IPO), Maven Clinic.
column2: Anu Duggal, Founding Partner (linkedin.com/in/anu-duggal-568222) New York, NY

column1: Seed-stage fund. Checks: $500K-$4M. $260M AUM. Fund IV: $140M seed + Mustang I $120M follow-on. ~70% pre-product. Sectors: Enterprise, Fintech, Software Infrastructure, Healthcare, Consumer, Future of Work. 90% graduation rate to Series A. One of first female-led VC firms.
column2: Aileen Lee, Founder & Managing Partner (linkedin.com/in/aileenwlee) Palo Alto, CA; Caroline Duffy, Partner (linkedin.com/in/caroline-duffy-vc) Palo Alto, CA

column1: Crowdfunding platform (now IFW by Honeycomb Credit) for women-owned businesses. Reward-based crowdfunding, investment crowdfunding, grants ($2,500-$100K), SBA loans. 500,000+ founders/funders. 20,000+ startups raised $200M+. Fees: 5% platform + 3-5% processing. Dedicated IFundWomen of Color initiative.
column2: Karen Cahn, Founder & CEO (linkedin.com/in/karen-cahn) New York, NY

column1: Women-led angel group co-investing in early-stage startups. First check through later rounds. Individual angels invest $1,000+; collective invests $10K-$100K. Cost: $250/year membership + $3,000 min annual investment + 3% carry. No sourcing fees. 51%+ women investors and POC.
column2: Desiree Vargas Wrigley, Co-Founder (linkedin.com/in/desireevw) Chicago, IL

column1: Global angel network investing in companies with women in leadership with equity. Founded 1999. Astia Fund I: $32M Series A/B fund. Astia Edge: seed for Black and Latina women CEOs. $36M deployed into 64 cos. Sectors: SaaS, EdTech, FinTech, Energy, AI, Life Sciences. Expert Sift bias-free screening.
column2: Sharon Vosmek, CEO & Managing Partner (linkedin.com/in/sharonvosmek) San Francisco, CA; Victoria Pettibone, CIO & Managing Partner (linkedin.com/in/victoriapettibone) New York, NY

column1: Angel investing community by Hustle Fund. Pre-seed/seed in early software startups. Angel Squad: invest alongside fund, min $1,000/deal. 2,000+ members from 40+ countries, $30M+ invested across 70+ cos. Free 14-day trial. Sectors: Software, B2B, Fintech, Digital Health.
column2: Elizabeth Yin, Co-Founder & GP (linkedin.com/in/elizabethyin) San Francisco, CA; Eric Bahn, Co-Founder & GP (linkedin.com/in/ericbahn) San Francisco, CA

column1: Venture funds designed by/for women. Min investment: $10K; avg $35K. 14 thematic funds, ~2,000 women LPs, 120+ companies incl unicorns. Themes: Womens Health, Active Aging, Sustainability, Fintech, Rising America. Each fund: ~10 cos over 12-18 months. Max 249 investors/fund. Most active investor in womens health (60+ investments).
column2: Trish Costello, Founder & CEO (linkedin.com/in/trishcostello1) San Mateo, CA

column1: Impact angel education fund. 99 women per fund, min $30K investment. Fund invests $100K-$250K per company; $250K-$500K follow-ons. 12-16 impact companies over 2 years. Focus: education, health, food sustainability, clean energy, aging. 100% portfolio led by women and POC.
column2: Alicia Robb, Founder & CEO (linkedin.com/in/alicia-robb-a888228) Kanab, UT

column1: ---SKIP TO ROW 126---

NYC and London early-stage VC investing exclusively in women-founded companies. Fund + angel membership syndicate. Angel Membership: $750/year, $2,500 min check, ~2.5% admin fee, 20% carry. No accredited investor requirement to join. Six-part masterclass. Sectors: EV infrastructure, aerospace, climate tech, maternal health. 50K newsletter subscribers.
column2: Lindsey Taylor Wood, Founder & GP (linkedin.com/in/lindseytaylorwood) New York, NY; Olivia Fleming, Partner (linkedin.com/in/olivia-fleming-88186b46) New York, NY

column1: VC fund from How Women Lead (25,000+ member network). 100% women-led, 50% WOC. Fund I ($10M): Late Seed-Series B. Fund II ($10M): Seed. Checks: $250K-$2M (seed) to $2M-$5M (Series A/B). Min LP: $25,000 over 4 years. 600+ first-time LPs. Sectors: Health, Future of Work, Fintech, Biotech, Climate.
column2: Julie Castro Abrams, Managing Partner (linkedin.com/in/julie-castro-abrams) San Francisco, CA

column1: Early-stage VC, $111M fund. Pre-Seed ($100K-$300K), Seed ($250K-$500K), Series A follow-ons. 85+ portfolio cos, 16 unicorns, $33B+ valuations. Sectors: Fintech, Healthcare, Consumer Tech, AI, Climate. 79% underrepresented founders, 54% women, 47% Black.
column2: Serena Williams, Founder (linkedin.com/in/serena-williams-99612b205) Palm Beach Gardens, FL; Beth Ferreira, General Partner (linkedin.com/in/bethmferreira) New York, NY

column1: Early-stage B2B venture firm. 200+ operator LPs from leading tech cos. Stages: Seed, Series A, some B. Sectors: Enterprise SaaS, data infrastructure, HR tech, fintech, healthcare tech. 45+ portfolio cos, 5 unicorns. LPs include COOs of Waymo, Stripe, Cloudflare.
column2: Mallun Yen, Founder & Managing Partner (linkedin.com/in/mallun) San Francisco, CA; Dana Marohn Spiliotis, Partner (linkedin.com/in/danamarohn) San Francisco, CA

column1: First women-led next-gen VC. Pre-seed and Seed. Sectors: Future of living, working, staying healthy -- consumer, healthcare, beauty, web3. Portfolio: Everlywell ($2.9B unicorn), Function of Beauty, Lovevery. 70+ investments. US and Asia cross-border focus.
column2: Pocket Sun, Co-Founder & Managing Partner (linkedin.com/in/pocketsun) Vancouver, BC; Elizabeth Galbut, Co-Founder & Managing Partner (linkedin.com/in/egalbut) New York, NY

column1: Pre-seed fund (fka Jane VC). Checks: $250K-$750K. Sectors: B2B software, future of work, fintech, digital health, AI. 68% portfolio outside Bay Area. No pitch deck or warm intro required -- 2-minute survey to apply. 18% of investments from cold emails. NOTE: active site is january.ventures.
column2: Jennifer Neundorfer, Co-Founder & MP (linkedin.com/in/jkneundorfer) Boston, MA; Maren Thomas Bannon, Co-Founder & MP (linkedin.com/in/marenbannon) London, UK

column1: Family office, ~$50M fund. Stages: Seed through Series D. Also LP in 25+ emerging funds led by women/diverse managers. Sectors: healthcare, consumer, enterprise, fintech, education, future of work. 94 portfolio cos, 4 unicorns. Incl HopSkipDrive, Pair Eyewear.
column2: Linnea Roberts, Founder & CEO (linkedin.com/in/linnea-roberts-5a3630292) Atherton, CA; Ita Ekpoudom, Partner (linkedin.com/in/itaekpoudom) New York, NY

column1: Mission-driven fund. Pre-seed, Seed, Series A. Original fund: $25K-$100K; Opportunity Fund: $250K-$1M. Accelerator: $100K for 5%. 200+ portfolio cos. Sectors: consumer products (24%), social impact (14%), business services (12%). Exclusively women, POC, LGBTQ founders.
column2: Arlan Hamilton, Founder & Managing Partner (linkedin.com/in/arlanhamilton) Los Angeles, CA; Christie Pitts, General Partner (linkedin.com/in/christiepitts) San Francisco, CA

column1: Seed-stage VC with gender/diversity lens. Checks: $100K-$250K. Sectors: Enterprise SaaS, AI, blockchain, cleantech, agtech, edtech, robotics. 41 portfolio cos. Requires product in market. At least one woman founder with 20%+ equity. Bank of America partner. #InvestInWomen Tour.
column2: Elisa Miller-Out, Co-Founder & MP (linkedin.com/in/elisamillerout) Ithaca, NY

column1: Global women-run venture firm. Post-seed early stage, Seed and Series A. Sectors: Edtech, fintech, foodtech, health/wellness tech. Portfolio ~50% US, ~50% emerging markets (MENAT, Singapore). 26 investments. 48% IRR first year.
column2: Heather Henyon, Founding GP (linkedin.com/in/heatherhenyon) Dubai/New York

column1: First US VC to focus on Series A with gender-diverse leadership. Incubated at Harvard Business School. Stages: Series A and B. Sectors: Enterprise SaaS, consumer internet, EdTech. Portfolio: Newsela (unicorn), HopSkipDrive. Geographic: Pacific NW and California.
column2: Edith Dorsen, Co-Founder & MD (linkedin.com/in/edithdorsen) Portland, OR; Monica Dodi, Co-Founder & MD (linkedin.com/in/monicadodi) Los Angeles, CA

column1: Fund within Alumni Ventures platform. Pre-seed through later stage. 15-20 investments/fund. AV check sizes $100K-$10M, sweet spot $1M-$3M. LP min ~$10K. Sectors: healthtech, fintech, AI, consumer. AV ranks 4th among VCs investing in female-led startups (357+ women-led cos backed).
column2: Laura Rippy, Managing Partner (linkedin.com/in/laurarippy) Boston, MA; Meera Oak, Partner (linkedin.com/in/meeraoak) San Francisco, CA

column1: Asset management focused on women in leadership since 2007. NOT a VC -- primarily public markets via WCEO ETF (NYSE). Companies with women CEOs across all sectors. Previously had private equity initiative (now on hiatus). Also runs Hypatia Investathon for college women.
column2: Patricia Lizarraga, Managing Partner & Founder (linkedin.com/in/patricializarraga) New York, NY
